name: Governor Guinn Millennium Scholarship
sponsor: State of Nevada — Office of the State Treasurer
summary: Merit award (up to $10,000 lifetime) for Nevada high school graduates who meet GPA/coursework requirements and attend an eligible Nevada college or university.

award.notes: Lifetime maximum; disbursed per enrolled credit at eligible NSHE institutions.

deadline.notes: Eligibility is based on Nevada high school graduation plus GPA/coursework rather than a single application deadline — verify current criteria against the source.

other: Graduate from a Nevada high school and meet the GPA / core-coursework requirements (verify current thresholds)
Enroll at an eligible NSHE (Nevada System of Higher Education) institution
